description: Canonical SOUL-compliance patterns — shared by spec2c (generate) and spec2c-check (check).

patterns.message: Shell execution forbidden; use vl_safe_exec() (fork+execvp, no shell)
patterns.suggestion: Replace with vl_safe_exec() for fork+execvp, or use direct syscalls
Remove /dev/null redirect; errors must go to stderr+stdout
Remove stderr redirection; errors must be visible

patterns.message: Possible SQL injection via string interpolation
Return value not checked for null/error
patterns.suggestion: Add null check; every return must be verified per SOUL §7

patterns.message: Direct exit() in core logic; use vl_die() for structured JSON errors
patterns.suggestion: Replace exit()/abort() with vl_die() to emit structured JSON on failure
